nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as distraction from creative core
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily engage AI tools to help me deal with administrative tasks and paperwork

nodes.label: AI for client communication
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of miscommunication and frustration
nodes.grounding_span: I transferred my drawing into a AI and was able to make it into a realistic, 3d image and was able to convince the client

nodes.label: AI requiring skill and attention to use well
nodes.label_negative: AI as easy shortcut producing 'good enough' flawed work
nodes.grounding_span: they have not bothered to learn how to prompt engineer and will either become frustrated or end up producing work that is 'good enough' but contains other flaws

nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous idea generator replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I very rarely ever use AI to generate unique ideas or concepts. Rather I prefer to use it to tell my ideas to and to try to identify gaps or inconsistencies

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.label_negative: AI suppressing human potential in arts
nodes.grounding_span: how do we use this tool to maximize human potential rather than suppressing it

nodes.label: AI as cost-cutting tool by executives
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool for creative enhancement
nodes.grounding_span: I am afraid it will be used by unscrupulous parties (especially executives) to cut corners, cheat workers and de-value traditional film-making techniques

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: maximize human potential rather than suppressing it

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: keeping on top of my paperwork for my union membership, tailoring my resume and portfolio, managing my calendar

nodes.label: Authentic skill and craftsmanship
nodes.grounding_span: neglect details that the end user will see and judge them on

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily engage AI tools to help me deal with administrative tasks and paperwork

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's literal interpretation and 'pink elephant' problem
nodes.grounding_span: It is a rather specific thing, but when you mention to a model to NOT include some element, it would invariably show up

nodes.label: Concern about improper AI use by others
nodes.grounding_span: I caution a lot of people to be careful and sparing in using AI tools because of this

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as research catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to use it to tell my ideas to and to try to identify gaps or inconsistencies in my own work

nodes.label: Proactive adaptation to AI rather than fear of replacement
nodes.grounding_span: I am afraid it will be used by unscrupulous parties (especially executives) to cut corners, cheat workers and de-value traditional film-making techniques

nodes.label: Analogical reasoning — uses concrete analogies to evaluate AI
nodes.grounding_span: It's like dealing with humans and you tell them to not think of a pink elephant

nodes.label: Strategic adaptation — uses AI for specific tasks while maintaining core skills
nodes.grounding_span: Elements that I didn't want included, I did not even mention
